template: UPDATE customer SET email = "{customer_email}" WHERE customer_id = {customer_customer_id}
UPDATE film SET rental_rate = {film_rental_rate} WHERE film_id = {film_film_id}
UPDATE staff SET password = "{rand_string}" WHERE staff_id = {staff_staff_id}
UPDATE customer SET active = {customer_active} WHERE customer_id = {customer_customer_id}
UPDATE customer SET store_id = {store_store_id}, address_id = {address_address_id} WHERE customer_id = {customer_customer_id}
description: Update a customer's store and address for relocation.

template: UPDATE staff SET email = "{staff_email}", username = "{staff_username}", active = {staff_active} WHERE staff_id = {staff_staff_id}
UPDATE address SET address = "{address_line1}", district = "{address_district}", postal_code = "{address_postal_code}", phone = "{address_phone}" WHERE address_id = {address_address_id}
